title: TN elections 2026: Rajinikanth, Kamal Haasan, Suriya, Vikram, and others wish Vijay
description: Tamil star Vijay and his political party, Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), are celebrating a historic lead in the Tamil Nadu Assembly elections, sparking a wave of congratulatory messages from prominent figures in the film industry, including actors Rajinikanth, Kamal Haasan, Suriya, Vikram, and Sivakarthikeyan
